lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day!

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Can't talk now, I'm on duty.

sections.title: While wearing the Silly jester costume

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Good day, jester! Got any new jokes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I only use old, recycled jokes. It's better for the environment.

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: HaHa!

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Hail, [Fremennik name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day! How are you doing?

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Pretty good. It's nice to have a day off from troll- killing duty.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you killed many trolls?

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Of course. It's all part of growing up around here. You get used to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

sections.title: While wearing the Silly jester costume

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Hey jester, this area is not a suitable place for civilians to wander about in. Trolls everywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right you are. I'll be careful.

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Hail, [Fremennik name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day!

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Are you here to help with the trolls?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm afraid not, I have other things to do.

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Well, watch yourself. Those rocks that the trolls throw can take your arm off.

sections.title: While wearing the Silly jester costume

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Good day, jester! Got any new jokes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I only use old, recycled jokes. It's better for the environment.

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Haha!

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: Hail, [Fremennik name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day!

lines.speaker: Honour guard
lines.text: I hope you're not heading north. There are lots of trolls, very dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the warning. I'll keep my eyes peeled.
